## Summary

- Describe the user-facing and technical impact of this PR.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run test`

## Storybook Contract Checklist

- [ ] For every new or changed custom component state/variant, I added or updated Storybook stories.
- [ ] I reviewed Storybook a11y output for default states and resolved reported violations.
- [ ] If visual output changed, I reviewed Chromatic results (or explained why snapshot upload was skipped).
